'''[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Nord''' was the commanding officer of the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] ship, [[Spirit of Solaris|''Pride of Aridus'']].<ref name="DF: JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

==History==
Around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]<ref name="Date1">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' states Obota's service as third officer occurred a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the events of the novel. ''Jedi Knight'' is dated to [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Nord commanded the [[Spirit of Solaris|''Pride of Aridus'']], an [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] which participated in a [[Infiltration of unidentified Imperial planet|Special Ops operation]] on an [[Unidentified planet (Alliance Special Ops operation)|Imperial-controlled planet]]. His [[Second officer/Legends|Second Officer]] was the [[Second Lieutenant/Legends|second lieutenant]] [[Alfonso Luiz Obota]].<ref name="DF: JK" />

Feigning to discharge legitimate cargo, the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] landed and let out a twelve-man team of men and women [[Commando/Legends|commandos]], who — according to the insertion plan — were supposed to come back in exactly six [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]]. The group being late by two [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], Nord was almost ready to leave without them. Suddenly, the commandos finally raced toward the ship under heavy fire from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. As the ''Pride of Aridus'' fell under fire as well, Nord gave the order to take off, intent on leaving the SpecOps team behind. Not willing to abandon his fellow Rebels, Obota punched Nord in the face and confined him in his cabin. During that time Obota took command of the vessel in an attempt to extract as many as possible, which however resulted in additional [[death/Legends|deaths]].<ref name="DF: JK" />

Once they made it back to Alliance space, Obota was court-martialed, with Nord claiming that he had always be insubordinate.<ref name="DF: JK" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1stm}}
